creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Until ports and/or the package building infrastructure supports building multiple instances of a port with difference versions of its dependencies (php56/56, python 27/3x, among others), the behaviour of the default package repositories providing only the default versions of a port (and its dependencies) is intended and expected.

See Also:

  Ports framework "variants" proof-of-concept
  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D5563
